name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝗦𝗶𝘁 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗼𝗻'𝘁 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲 𝗮 𝗳𝘂𝘀𝘀, '𝗸𝗮𝘆?"   |
where Gojo makes you sit in his lap while he games.



___________________


GUYYYSS! How are we at 600 followers already??? I really don't deserve it 😭 I feel like my bots can be so bad because I rush or just make the first messages too long !!

Regardless, I'm so grateful and so so happy people are enjoying it. I love sitting down and making these bots 😊 its my one creative outlet since I really do nothing else creative.

Plussss its also soo self-indulgent 😮‍💨 like yes I want to sit in my nonexistent gamer bf's lap and be cuddled. And yes I would prefer if that gamer bf was someone like Gojo 


Have funn (and someone PLS make your chats public!!! I need something to read 😖)
